mapper.insert:
SELECT NVL(MAX(project_id), 0) + 1 FROM project
INSERT INTO project( project_id, project_title, project_describe, project_identifier, status, start_date, finish_date, created_at ) VALUES( #{projectId}, #{projectTitle}, #{projectDescribe}, #{projectIdentifier}, 'J1', #{startDate}, #{finishDate}, SYSDATE - INTERVAL '9' HOUR )
